text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower goes to watch the spring Tenno Sho
with Sakura Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She watches as Mejiro McQueen enthralls the
audience with her magnificant performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing how McQueen brings happiness to
many people, Rice compares her to a blue rose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And believing that she herself, in contrast, brings
misfortune to those around her, Rice Shower says
it is her dream to become a blue rose one day as
well.
